testcase.name: test_cancel_sets_cancel_at_period_end
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_moyasar_live.py:203: in test_cancel_sets_cancel_at_period_end u = _new_user() ^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration28_moyasar_live.py:64: in _new_user assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"signup failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: signup failed: 429 {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sub_initial_paid_activates_and_credits
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_moyasar_live.py:346: in test_sub_initial_paid_activates_and_credits u = _new_user() ^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration28_moyasar_live.py:64: in _new_user assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"signup failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: signup failed: 429 {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
